title: Tsarin Haɗin Gwiwa
attention: Wannan shirin haɗin gwiwa ba an yi shi ba don kiran 'yan uwa' ko 'abokan ciniki.' Don Allah karanta {faqLink} kafin ci gaba.
earnPerSale: Samu {amount} a kowane siyar na abokin ciniki sabon!
shareUrl: Raba URL ɗin haɗin gwiwa na musamman tare da abokai
